## Summary



## Tier / scope

- Plan tier touched: <!-- e.g. tier-04-salsa, or `n/a` for cross-cutting -->
- Crate scope(s): <!-- core, storage, parser, … (must match cog.toml scopes) -->

## Checklist

- [ ] **Failing test added before implementation (TDD)** — first commit on the branch.
- [ ] If this introduces an architectural decision: new ADR under `docs/adr/NNNN-*.md`, linked from the plan/tier file.
- [ ] If this introduces a new external dependency: justified in the description with a link to its docs and rationale tied to scalability / reliability / efficiency / maintainability.
- [ ] `cargo nextest run --workspace` green locally.
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` green locally.
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` green locally.
- [ ] `cargo deny check` green locally.
- [ ] `cargo test --test architecture` green locally.
- [ ] Audit verdict file present at `.claude/plans/<slug>/audit-state.json` with `verdict: PASS` (post tier-01, generated by `/spec-audit`).
- [ ] Memory probe delta reported in the description for tiers touching Salsa or in-RAM graph (R1 risk gate).

## Out of scope

<!-- Anything the audit might flag as "should be here too" but is intentionally not. Link to a follow-up issue if applicable. -->
